location.name: Art appraisers in Miami, Florida
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Miami, Florida.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works. With Decades of experience experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Antique Art Buyers
listedAppraisers.description: Antique Art Buyers provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Antique paintings. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anubis Appraisal & Estate Services
listedAppraisers.description: Anubis Appraisal & Estate Services, Inc. was founded in 2003 by Tara Ana Finley, ISA, AM as a premier nationwide fine art and residential contents appraisal company. With more than 30 years of auction house experience in the antiques, fine arts, and antiquities fields, the firm has built a reputation on integrity and personalized service supported by extensive market expertise. They specialize in American and European art, Cuban and Latin American fine art, antiquities, and a broad range of decorative arts.

listedAppraisers.name: Art of Estates - Art Appraisal & Consulting
listedAppraisers.description: Art of Estates - Art Appraisal & Consulting offers fine art appraisal services serving Miami, FL. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.
